title: Lendingkart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lendingkart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Full Stack Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!
